description_long: This object consists of three adjacent swivel chairs, each with a high, slightly tapered backrest and a square seat. The chairs feature different upholstery patterns: one is black with a quilted diamond pattern, another is dark blue with a subtle dotted texture, and the third is brown with a plaid design. All three chairs are supported by a black, five-legged star base with casters for mobility. The central support columns are cylindrical and appear to be made of metal, with visible adjustment mechanisms at the back. The chairs lack armrests, giving them a minimalist and functional appearance suitable for office or waiting room environments. The upholstery appears to be fabric or synthetic leather, providing a semi-soft seating surface.
description: A set of three high-back swivel chairs with distinct upholstery patterns, black star bases with casters, and no armrests. Each chair features a visible adjustment mechanism and a minimalist, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three chairs side by side, highlighting their different upholstery patterns and the absence of armrests.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth of the seats, the thickness of the backrests, and the alignment of the chairs in a row.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the adjustment mechanisms on the back of each chair and the full shape of the backrests.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the chairs, the seat thickness, and the base structure.
attribute_central_support_column: Cylindrical black metal column with a telescoping feature and attached adjustment mechanism.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, slightly tapered backrest with gentle contouring, upholstered in patterned fabric or synthetic leather, no cutouts.
